commands.review_summary:
This PR shrinks the `eslint/no-underscore-dangle` allow list by renaming local/private identifiers across UI chat, dreaming, app render, gateway auth status, QQBot, and MSTeams test helpers.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a cleanup PR, not a bug report with a failing user path. The relevant check is source/diff review plus lint proof that the renamed identifiers no longer need allow-list exceptions.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is explicit maintainer review because the protected label is present.

target.title: chore(lint): reduce underscore-dangle exceptions
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove 54 eslint/no-underscore-dangle allow-list entries total.
- Rename local UI state, chat helper fields, gateway/plugin locals, and QQBot module-private state to non-underscore names.
- Delete unused MSTeams attachment test helpers/constants instead of whitelisting them.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/dreaming.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/slash-commands.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.helpers.node.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/models-auth-status.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/audio.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/platform.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/commands/slash-commands-impl.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/ws-client.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/attachments.test.ts extensions/msteams/src/attachments.helpers.test.ts
- pnpm changed:lanes --json
- pnpm check:changed via Blacksmith Testbox tbx_01krx91eyne33me22jfezmnrbb, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26027104820
- codex review --uncommitted

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: reduce the underscore-dangle exception list after enabling the lint rule in #83422.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs after the patch, plus focused Vitest and check:changed.
Evidence after fix: copied terminal output from the after-fix lint and test runs:

```text
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Finished in 19.3s on 14838 files with 217 rules using 1 threads.

Test Files  12 passed (12)
Tests  287 passed (287)

blacksmith run summary sync=delegated command=3m21.329s total=3m28.815s exit=0
{"provider":"blacksmith-testbox","leaseId":"tbx_01krx91eyne33me22jfezmnrbb","slug":"violet-prawn","exitCode":0}
```

Observed result after fix: the allow-list is down from 207 entries on origin/main to 153 entries on this branch, and the touched UI/chat/gateway/QQBot/MSTeams surfaces pass lint, focused tests, and changed-lane checks.
What was not tested: full repository test suite beyond check:changed selected lanes.
